honest_gaps: wsfed: exc-c14n canonicalisation not applied — same posture as the existing SAML 2.0 broker; bytes are authoritative.
wsfed: wattr1.0 attribute query is not implemented (rare; never seen in cave customer deployments).
wsfed: Active Profile token encryption is out of scope — passive-profile only.

oid4vc: full URDNA2015 (RDF Dataset Canonicalisation 2.0) NOT used — JCS (RFC 8785) is used as a substitute. Sufficient when both sides use the same code path, but strict wallets enforcing URDNA2015 will reject these proofs. Documented in module-level docs.
oid4vc: multibase prefix 'u' (base64url-no-pad) used instead of Keycloak's 'z' (base58btc) — both are valid per multibase spec; rationale: no base58 crate in workspace.
oid4vc: DID resolution not implemented — verifier uses the co-located issuer key directly. Real deployments must resolve verificationMethod URLs.
oid4vc: presentation_submission descriptor is echoed but not validated against the presentation_definition.

email_listener: lettre async transport not used — outbox uses std::thread::sleep for backoff so it stays Send + Sync without a tokio handle for tests. Production should swap in AsyncSmtpTransport with a tokio runtime.

email_listener: GdprDataExportPayload accepts an EmailAttachment but the attachment is NOT yet embedded into the MIME body. Typed-send still delivers a valid message; attachment embedding is a documented future enhancement.
